productDisplayName: Police Women Pure London 50 ml Perfume
description: Style NotePure police London Femme, for women, is available in a white flacon with the symbol of British flag, lion and royal crow.Product DetailsThe composition introduces fruity-floral notes of peach, lemon, pear and violet leaf in a top. A heart is composed of jasmine and freesia with fresh green leaves. A base introduces woody notes of sandalwood and cedar, fondling with a sensual musky trailCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 50 ml
